Text: Python is a powerful programming language used for web development, data analysis, and machine learning.
Machine learning allows computers to learn patterns from data and make predictions automatically.
Information retrieval focuses on storing, indexing, and searching documents efficiently.
Search engines use indexing techniques and ranking algorithms to retrieve relevant documents.
Boolean retrieval uses operators such as AND, OR, and NOT to filter search results.
Data storage systems organize information for fast retrieval and efficient access.
Python provides libraries for building graphical user interfaces and search applications.
Artificial intelligence combines machine learning, search, and reasoning to solve complex problems.
